_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of programming principles and practices
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of MLOps principles and practices, including CI/CD for ML, automated retraining pipelines, model versioning, A/B testing infrastructure, and canary deployment patterns.
comments: NICE knowledge intersects with WIDAI AI domain. Knowledge AI-K-017 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: OP-K-001 (OP, cosine: 0.494), OP-K-007 (OP, cosine: 0.467).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.8/10 (raw 0.582). Shared vocabulary: [knowledge, practices, principles]. NICE-only terms [programming] vs WIDAI-only terms [automated, b, canary, cd, ci, deployment] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.894 (P=0.951, R=0.844). P exceeds R by 0.107 — the NICE element's 6 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 22 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the NICE element.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.7%). "Knowledge of programming principles and practices" and "Knowledge of MLOps principles and practices, including CI/CD for ML, automated r" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.495 < STS 0.582 (gap -0.087). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [programming] and [automated, b, canary] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 20.8%. Shared tokens: [knowledge, practices, principles]. NICE-only: [programming]. WIDAI-only: [automated, b, canary, cd, ci, deployment].
